user_query: Child has some messy lunches that won't pack well for school - delete a few options that sounds hard to transport or eat cleanly.
nodes_to_delete: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Tuna Pasta Salad — Smoky Wrap
reasoning: Only the Tuna Pasta Salad clearly contains a non-portable, bowl-style serving suggestion that could be messy for school. Other lunch candidates (Salmon Wrap, Turkey Sandwich, Caprese Sandwich) are described as portable/grab-and-go, so they were excluded. The stuffed bell peppers are a dinner item and outside the requested lunch scope.
